title: Replace ticket-derived tx_id generation with issued transaction IDs
goal: Implement the plan-defined rule that new transaction identity is issued canonically during begin and is never derived from ticket identity in new writes.
scope: Replace any new-write path that derives tx_id from ticket_id with canonical issued tx_id allocation.
Ensure issued tx_id allocation occurs only during canonical begin.
Ensure compatibility behavior does not weaken strict new-write semantics.
out_of_scope: Broad resume simplification outside exact identity allocation.
Sentinel elimination outside direct identity-write consequences.
expected_outputs: Runtime changes that allocate tx_id only through canonical begin.
Verification evidence showing new writes do not derive tx_id from ticket_id.
A code-to-plan traceability summary for identity allocation changes.
acceptance_criteria: No new-write path derives tx_id from ticket_id.
Issued tx_id allocation occurs only during canonical begin.
tx_id remains integer-valued in JSON-facing artifacts.
Any compatibility handling remains read-path-only or otherwise bounded so new semantics stay strict.
